title: Budget Alerts for Runaway AI Agent Loops
excerpt: Agentic coding workflows can burn tokens overnight. Set thresholds, anomaly detection, and escalation paths before the invoice arrives.
bodyHtml:
A single misconfigured agent—or an enthusiastic intern leaving a loop running—can turn a predictable $4K monthly AI bill into a five-figure surprise. Traditional cloud alerts don't cover IDE-embedded tools or personal API keys rolled into org billing.

Alert types worth enabling

  • Monthly budget thresholds at 70%, 90%, and 100% with Slack or email routing
  • Daily spike detection when spend exceeds 2× trailing seven-day average
  • Per-developer caps for trial accounts or contractors
  • Model-specific alerts when premium model share crosses a policy limit

Response playbook

  1. Identify the team/repo driving the spike within minutes—not at month close
  2. Pause or throttle non-production API keys if policy allows
  3. Coach on agent loop patterns (retry limits, max iterations)
  4. Document the incident for the next vendor negotiation

ForgeMeter smart alerts

ForgeMeter includes budget thresholds, usage spikes, and anomaly detection designed for AI development stacks—24/7 monitoring without intercepting developer requests. Team and Pro plans add custom alert routing and repo-level drill-down.
